mapper.select: SELECT * FROM voj_discussion_threads dt WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} ORDER BY discussion_thread_id LIMIT 1

SELECT *, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voj_discussion_replies dr WHERE dt.discussion_thread_id = dr.discussion_thread_id ) AS discussion_replies FROM voj_discussion_threads dt WHERE discussion_thread_id = #{discussionThreadId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voj_discussion_threads(discussion_thread_creator_uid, discussion_thread_create_time, problem_id, discussion_topic_id, discussion_thread_name) VALUES (#{discussionThreadCreator.uid}, #{discussionThreadCreateTime}, #{problem.problemId}, #{discussionTopic.discussionTopicId}, #{discussionThreadTitle})
